response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and agentic workflows including MCP, aligning well with core requirements; however, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his AI experience is implied rather than detailed, raising uncertainty about staff-level GenAI leadership depth.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Direct exposure to Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflow tooling
Proven track record in building scalable data systems and open-source developer tools
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to production-grade AI/GenAI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited documentation of leading technical discovery sessions or mentoring in AI teams
